query:
SELECT 
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  deliveryTeacher,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  partnerFee,
  deliveryCity
FROM orders
WHERE orderNo IN (
  'ORD1767678216790187',
  'ORD1767678216755702',
  'ORD1767678216720813',
  'ORD1767678216681668',
  'ORD1767678216645339'
)
ORDER BY orderNo;
